name: Manufacturing & Automotive (DACH)
description: Large manufacturing enterprises and automotive OEMs/suppliers in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland modernizing their IT landscapes with cloud-based SAP S/4HANA, IoT platforms, and hybrid cloud architectures for production-critical workloads.

segmentation.buyer_profile: CIO, VP IT Infrastructure, Head of Digital Manufacturing, SAP Program Director
drivers: Supply chain resilience and digital twin platforms

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on German manufacturing IT spend and SAP migration wave

tam.description: Total IT spend by manufacturing and automotive enterprises in DACH (~EUR 15B)

sam.description: Cloud services, SAP hosting/migration, and managed infrastructure addressable by T-Systems

som.description: Achievable share leveraging SAP Platinum Partner status and existing Mittelstand/enterprise relationships

competitive_landscape: Accenture, IBM/Kyndryl, Capgemini, Atos/Eviden, AWS, Microsoft Azure, All for One Group (SAP)
